calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Feb-05-2003 Vacated

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-05-2003 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day. Commissioner: Loretta M. Norris; Clerk: P. Dias; Reporter: June Leathley. Arlene Catherine Helfrich, Esq. represented Plaintiff, DMIP A California Partnership and Defemdamt, Barbara Carberry appeared in pro per. The case settled per oral stipulation of parties which is read into the record. Trial date is vacated.
